plan: Trim SPY to meet concentration limits and reduce overall risk.
Sell all flagged positions (QQQI, QQQ, SMH) and all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to zero for capital preservation.
Maintain CRWD as a quality tech holding.
Allocate a small portion to OXY, a high-scoring value setup, for diversification.
Hold a significant cash buffer to reduce overall leverage and prepare for future opportunities.
conservative.read: This conservative plan targets a modest ~1.5%/month, prioritizing capital preservation. Risk is significantly reduced by cutting leveraged ETFs and flagged positions, aiming for low drawdown.

plan: Trim SPY to meet concentration limits, reducing overall portfolio risk.
Sell all flagged positions (QQQI, QQQ, SMH) to improve portfolio health.
Reduce SOXL to a small, manageable allocation and exit SPAL.
Maintain CRWD as a strong tech holding.
Add MSFU, a high-scoring long setup, to introduce new growth potential.
Maintain a cash buffer to manage leverage and provide flexibility.
balanced.read: This balanced plan targets ~2.5%/month, focusing on risk-first growth. It reduces overall leverage and concentration while introducing new high-quality setups, aiming for controlled drawdown.

plan: Trim SPY to meet concentration limits, freeing capital for higher-conviction plays.
Sell all flagged positions (QQQI, QQQ, SMH) to remove drag from underperforming assets.
Increase SOXL exposure and exit SPAL, focusing leveraged bets on strong sectors.
Maintain CRWD as a strong tech holding.
Add MSFU, a high-scoring long setup, and allocate a significant portion to it.
Keep a smaller cash buffer, deploying capital into high-potential setups with strict stops.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4%/month, aiming for stretch growth. It embraces higher leverage and concentration in strong setups, but be aware of significantly increased drawdown potential and daily decay of leveraged ETFs.

plan: Trim SPY and CRWD to reduce growth-oriented exposure and reallocate.
Increase QQQI allocation significantly to prioritize monthly distributions.
Sell all flagged positions (QQQ, SMH) and all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to near zero.
Focus on stable, income-generating assets.
Maintain a cash buffer for stability and future income opportunities.
income.read: This income plan targets ~1%/month, prioritizing steady monthly distributions. It significantly reduces growth and leverage for lower drawdown, but distributions are variable and NAV can still fall.
